---

Great salespeople never blame others. They never blame the economy. They never blame conditions for their performance. They might want to, but they know. Long ago they gave up on the blame game. They know that the blame game, blaming is just something that you do in order to become a slave. Don't blame. It doesn't work. It just ties you up and shackles. The greats are big on responsibility. They didn't get a deal. They don't blame it on a customer. They didn't get a deal. They don't blame it on the banks. They don't get a deal. They don't blame it on their manager or their product or their price or their offering. They're not little bitches. They're great. Okay? They're big on accountability, big on the buck stops here. They let politicians talk about the Red Rick while the great salespeople, the real producers, the real people, the real deals, say, hey, the buck stops right here. I didn't get the deal. I didn't get it because of this. And that's how they get great because they don't pass the buck on. It's their responsibility and that's how they get great and stay great. Be responsible. Be accountable and don't blame anybody else. It just makes you a slave.
